name: Southwestern Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 cans whole kernel corn (15.25 oz each), drained
1 can black beans (15 oz), rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the corn, black beans, and half of the salsa in a slow cooker.
2. Top with chicken; pour remaining salsa over chicken.
3. Cover and cook on HIGH for 3-4 hours or LOW for 7-8 hours, until meat juices run clear.
4. Sprinkle with cheese; cover until cheese is melted, about 5 minutes.
